payload.summary: Successfully created comprehensive framework for finding and evaluating community implementations across GitHub, npm/PyPI, Stack Overflow, and documentation sources. The solution includes systematic search strategies, evaluation criteria with scoring matrix (code quality 0.3, maintenance 0.25, adoption 0.2, compatibility 0.15, documentation 0.1), decision trees for choosing between use-as-is, adapt, or build-from-scratch, practical examples including WebSocket reconnection case study, and implementation code with CommunitySolutionFinder class. The framework helps developers save time and leverage battle-tested implementations instead of reinventing solutions.
